reason: Verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report the result back through the chat interface within 3 minutes.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the SuperAgent home page with agents listed in the sidebar.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260511-225359-s5u0" agent - Successfully opened the agent's chat interface with the message input field visible.
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was successfully entered into the chat input field and sent by clicking the send button.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent successfully completed the task within 17 seconds, as indicated by the "Worked for 17s" message.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." All three tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) completed successfully with green checkmarks.
